title: Studio Command Catalog
description: Structured catalog of all commands available in formspec-studio-core. Each entry defines the command type string, payload shape, side effects, and optional examples. Consumers — LLM agents, CLI tools, visual editors — read this catalog to discover available mutations and construct valid command payloads for Project.dispatch().

name.description: Property name in the payload object.

type.description: Type annotation. Uses JSON Schema primitives (string, number, boolean, object, array) with clarifications in description.

enum.description: When present, restricts the property to these literal values.

default.description: Default value when property is omitted.

NodeRef.description: Reference to a component tree node. Provide either bind (field key) or nodeId (for unbound layout nodes).

type.description: Command discriminant passed as command.type to Project.dispatch().

sideEffects.description: Side effects triggered after the command executes.

returns.description: Extra return properties beyond standard CommandResult.

commands.description: Add a field, group, or display item to the definition tree.

payload.name: parentPath
payload.description: Dot-path of parent group. Root if omitted.

payload.name: insertIndex
payload.description: Position within parent children. Appends if omitted.

payload.name: options
payload.description: Array of {value, label} objects for choice/multiChoice fields.

payload.name: labels
payload.description: i18n label overrides keyed by locale.

payload.name: repeatable
payload.description: Group only: whether the group is repeatable.

payload.name: optionSet
payload.description: Name of a shared option set.

payload.name: currency
payload.description: ISO 4217 currency code for money fields.

payload.name: relevant
payload.description: FEL expression. Shorthand for creating a bind on the new item.

returns.insertedPath: Dot-path of the newly added item.

examples.note: Add a string field at the root level.

commands.description: Remove an item and its children from the definition tree. Cascades to binds and component references.

payload.name: path
payload.description: Dot-path of the item to delete.

commands.description: Rename an item's key. Cascades to binds, shapes, variables, and component references via FEL rewriting.

payload.name: path
payload.description: Dot-path of the item to rename.

payload.name: newKey
payload.description: New key (validated for uniqueness among siblings).

commands.description: Move an item to a different parent or position. Cascades path references.

payload.name: sourcePath
payload.description: Dot-path of the item to move.

payload.name: targetParentPath
payload.description: Dot-path of the new parent group. Root if omitted.

payload.name: targetIndex
payload.description: Position within new parent. Appends if omitted.

commands.description: Move an item one position up or down among its siblings.
Deep-copy an item and insert the clone after the original. Generates a unique key for the copy.
Set or update bind properties for a field path. Creates the bind entry if it doesn't exist.

payload.name: properties
payload.description: Bind properties to set: calculate, relevant, required, readonly, constraint, constraintMessage, default, nonRelevantBehavior, whitespace, excludedValue, disabledDisplay, extensions.

commands.description: Set an arbitrary property on a definition item. Supports dotted paths for nested properties.

payload.name: property
payload.description: Property name (supports dotted paths for nesting).

payload.name: value
payload.description: Value to set. Null to remove.

commands.description: Change a field's data type.
Set inline options or assign a named option set to a field.

payload.name: options
payload.description: Array of {value, label} objects for inline options, or a string for named option set reference.

commands.description: Set or remove an extension on a definition item.
Set the form definition's title.
Set a top-level definition property (name, description, url, version, status, date, derivedFrom, versionAlgorithm, nonRelevantBehavior).

payload.name: value
payload.description: Value to set. Null to remove.

commands.description: Set a presentation-level property (e.g. pageMode, labelPosition, density, defaultCurrency). Null value removes the property.
Set or clear a group's ref (subform reference).

payload.name: ref
payload.description: Ref URL or null to clear.

payload.name: keyPrefix
payload.description: Optional prefix for imported item keys.

commands.description: Add a cross-field validation shape.

payload.name: target
payload.description: Dot-path or wildcard target for validation results.

payload.name: constraint
payload.description: FEL expression that must evaluate to true.

payload.name: activeWhen
payload.description: FEL expression: shape only applies when this is true.

payload.name: context
payload.description: Record<string, string> for named FEL sub-expressions.

commands.description: Update a property on an existing shape.
Set a shape's composition mode (combine child shapes via and/or/xone/not).
Rename a shape's ID. Updates composition references.
Remove a shape by ID.
Add a named FEL variable to the definition.

payload.name: scope
payload.description: Scope path (limits visibility to a subtree).

commands.description: Update a property on an existing variable.
Remove a named variable.
Create or update a named option set with inline options or an external source.
Remove a named option set.
Extract a field's inline options into a shared named option set and replace with a reference.

payload.name: path
payload.description: Dot-path of the field with inline options.

payload.name: name
payload.description: Name for the new option set.

commands.description: Add an external data source instance.

payload.name: schema
payload.description: JSON Schema for the instance data.

commands.description: Update a property on an existing instance.
Rename an instance. Updates FEL @instance() references.
Remove an instance by name.
Enable or disable the pre-form screener.
Add an item to the screener.
Remove a screener item by key.
Set bind properties for a screener field.
Add a screener routing rule.
Update a property on an existing route.
Remove a route by index.
Move a route one position up or down.
Add a version migration entry.

payload.name: fromVersion
payload.description: Source version this migration upgrades from.

commands.description: Remove a migration by source version.
Update a property on an existing migration.
Add a field mapping rule to a migration.

payload.name: target
payload.description: Target field path or null for removal.

commands.description: Update a property on a migration field map rule.
Remove a migration field map rule by index.
Set default values for newly added fields in a migration.

payload.name: defaults
payload.description: Map of field path to default value.

commands.description: Set or remove a single design token. Supports dot-delimited paths for nested tokens.
Replace the entire tokens object.
Set or remove a form-wide default presentation property (cascade level 1).
Add a selector-based presentation override (cascade level 2).

payload.name: apply
payload.description: Presentation properties to apply when matched.

commands.description: Update an existing selector's match criteria or applied properties.
Remove a selector by index.
Move a selector one position up or down. Order determines cascade priority.
Set or remove a per-item presentation override (cascade level 3).
Remove all per-item presentation overrides for an item.
Set a style property on a per-item override.
Set a widget configuration property on a per-item override.
Set an accessibility property on a per-item override.
Add a page layout definition to the theme.
Update a property on a theme page layout.
Remove a theme page layout by index.
Move a theme page layout one position up or down.
Add a grid region to a theme page.
Update a property on a grid region.
Remove a grid region by index.
Move a grid region one position up or down within its page.
Rename a theme page ID.
Change a grid region's key.
Replace the entire pages array.
Set or remove a named viewport breakpoint.

payload.name: minWidth
payload.description: Minimum viewport width in pixels. Null to remove.

commands.description: Replace the list of external stylesheet URLs.
Set a top-level theme document property.
Set or remove an extension on the theme document.
Set the semver compatibility range for the target definition.
Set a top-level mapping document property (direction, definitionRef, url).
Set a property on the mapping target schema.
Add a mapping rule.
Update a property on an existing mapping rule.
Remove a mapping rule by index.
Move a mapping rule one position up or down.
Set the output adapter format and configuration.
Set default values for the mapping output.
Auto-generate mapping rules from definition fields.

payload.name: scopePath
payload.description: Limit generation to fields under this path.

payload.name: replace
payload.description: If true, replaces existing rules. Otherwise appends.

commands.description: Set or remove an extension on the mapping document.
Set or remove an extension on a specific mapping rule.
Add a nested inner rule to a mapping rule (for group/array transforms).
Update a property on a nested inner rule.
Remove a nested inner rule by index.
Move a nested inner rule one position up or down.
Execute mapping rules against sample data and return the transformed output. Does not mutate state.
Add a node to the component tree.
Remove a node and its children from the component tree.
Move a node to a different parent or position.

payload.name: source
payload.description: Node ref of the node to move.

payload.name: targetParent
payload.description: Node ref of the new parent.

commands.description: Move a node one position up or down among its siblings.
Deep-copy a node and insert the clone after the original.
Wrap a node in a new container node.

payload.name: node
payload.description: Node ref of the node to wrap.

payload.name: wrapper
payload.description: { component: string, props?: object } for the wrapper.

returns.nodeRef: Reference to the new wrapper node.

commands.description: Replace a container node with its children (unwrap one level).

payload.name: node
payload.description: Node ref of the wrapper to remove.

commands.description: Set an arbitrary property on a component tree node.
Change a node's component type.

payload.name: preserveProps
payload.description: If true, keep existing props. If false, reset to defaults.

commands.description: Set a style property on a component tree node.
Set an accessibility property on a component tree node.
Splice (insert/remove) items in an array-valued node property.

payload.name: insert
payload.description: Items to insert at the splice point.

commands.description: Set which widget component renders a field. Convenience command that finds the node by field key.
Set or remove a responsive breakpoint override on a node.

payload.name: patch
payload.description: Properties to override at this breakpoint. Null to remove.

commands.description: Set a wizard-mode property on the component document.
Toggle a group's repeatable flag in the component tree.
Set how a group renders (table, accordion, card, etc.).
Configure data table rendering for a repeatable group.
Register a custom component template.
Update an existing custom component template.
Remove a custom component template.
Rename a custom component template.
Set or remove a Tier 3 design token override on the component document.
Set or remove a named breakpoint on the component document.
Set a top-level component document property.
Replace one or more project artifacts wholesale. Clears undo history.
Import items from an external definition into a target group.

payload.name: targetGroupPath
payload.description: Group to import into. Root if omitted.

payload.name: keyPrefix
payload.description: Prefix added to imported item keys to avoid collisions.

commands.description: Load an extension registry into the project.

payload.name: registry
payload.description: Registry document: { url: string, entries?: object[] }.

commands.description: Unload an extension registry.

payload.name: url
payload.description: Canonical URL of the registry to remove.

commands.description: Publish the current definition as a versioned release. Creates a changelog and frozen snapshot.
